options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description: Choose a difficulty for the randomization. This will make Checks harder to complete.

options.name: scenario
options.description: Choose which scenario you'd like to play!

options.name: dlc1
options.description: Taste of Adventures DLC

options.name: dlc2
options.description: Booms and Blooms DLC

options.name: dlc3
options.description: Dinos and Dynasties DLC

options.name: utility_buildings
options.description: Adding all 4 Utility Buildings to the pool.

options.name: decorations
options.description:
Adding all 11 Decoration Themes to the pool.
(9 Items if not having DLC "Dinos and Dynasties DLC")

options.name: statistics
options.description: Adding all 32 Statistics to the pool.

options.name: goal_guests
options.description: Choose how many guests are required to win the scenario

options.name: goal_money
options.description: Choose how much money is required to win the scenario

options.name: goal_coasters
options.description: Choose how many coasters are required to win the scenario

options.name: goal_coaster_excitement
options.description: Select the minimum excitement 😀 for a coaster to count towards your objective. 0 will disable a minimum excitement rating.

options.name: goal_coaster_intensity
options.description: Select the minimum intensity 😬 for a coaster to count towards your objective. 0 will disable a minimum intensity rating.

options.name: goal_ride_profit
options.description: Choose how much profit you need from all rides to win the scenario

options.name: goal_park_tickets
options.description: Choose how many park tickets has to be sold to win the scenario

options.name: goal_shops
options.description: Choose how many shops are required to win the scenario

options.name: goal_shop_profit
options.description: Choose how much profit you need from shops to win the scenario

options.name: challenge_customers
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a ride or shop with a maximum amount of customers, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_excitement
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a rollercoaster with a maximum excitement, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_intensity
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a rollercoaster with a maximum intensity, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_nausea
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a rollercoaster with a maximum nausea, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_satisfaction
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a rollercoaster with a maximum satisfaction, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_ride_revenue
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a rollercoaster with a total revenue, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_maximum_shop_revenue
options.description:
If a challenge determines you need a shop with a total revenue, this value will be the lowest it can ask for.
If this value is higher than the maximum, the generator will assume it is a mistake and set it to 0.

options.name: challenge_enable_decoration
options.description:
Determines if a challenge need an Attraction with a specific Decoration rating.
Diffictuly depending on the value.

options.name: challenge_employees
options.description:
Adding Challenge with "Have X amount of Employees""
Difficulty depends on the Experience Level an Employee must have

options.name: challenge_pay_money
options.description:
Adding Challenge with "Pay X amount of Money""
Depending on the Difficulty and if "goal_money" is set

options.name: challenge_skips
options.description: by default, every game start with 5 skips to, well, skip a challenge. This will add additional skips to be found in the item pool.

options.name: trap_player_money
options.description: When found, little Money is added to your Bank Account! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_attraction_breakdown
options.description: When found, instantly break specific amount of Attraction/s! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_attraction_voucher
options.description: When found, certain Guests will receive an Attraction Voucher in your Park! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_shops_ingredient
options.description: When found, ProductShops ingredients needs to be restocked! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_shops_clean
options.description: When found, Shops needs to be cleaned! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_shops_voucher
options.description: When found, some Guests will receive a Shop Voucher in your Park! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_employees_hiring
options.description:
When found, instantly Hire randomly picked Employees in your park! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.
The difficulty decides how many of them will be hired!

options.name: trap_employees_training
options.description:
When found, instantly send randomly picked Employees to the training room! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.
The difficulty decides how many of them will be training!

options.name: trap_employees_tired
options.description:
When found, instantly raise Employes tiredness! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.
The difficulty decides how many of them will be tired!

options.name: trap_weather
options.description: When found, Rainy, Cloudy, Sunny or Stormy Weather is comming over! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_spawn
options.description: When found, a wave of certain Guests appears in your Scenario! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_kill
options.description: When found, certain Guests will disappears in your Scenario! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_money
options.description: When found, certain Guests will receive or lose their Money in your Park! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_hunger
options.description: When found, Guests will be hungry! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_thirst
options.description: When found, Guests will be thirsty! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_bathroom
options.description: When found, alot of Guests will be running to the next toilet! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_vomit
options.description: When found, Too many Guests will try to find the next First-Aid room or Trashcan! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_happiness
options.description: When found, certain Guests will just be happy! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_tiredness
options.description: When found, certain Guests will just be tired! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.

options.name: trap_guests_vandal
options.description:
When found, certain Guests become a Vandal! Adding traps will increase the total number of items in the world.
The difficulty decides how many Guests vandalising your Park!

options.name: trap_research
options.description: When found, certain Decoration (Path Attachments included) Theme, Attraction/s or Shop/s have to be researched again.

options.name: trap_link
options.description: When a player found a Trap, it will spread to everyone that has TrapLink enabled!

options.name: guests_money_flux
options.description:
(If Guest Money Trap is enabled!)
Decides if the Guest receive or/and lose money.

options.name: progressive_speedups
options.description:
If included, the ability to use the speedups at the window will be restricted behind an item. 6 items total will be added, each progressively unlocking a faster speed.
Game Speedups (0x, 1x, 2x, 3x) are always usable.

options.name: parkitect_mods
options.description:
Enable or disable individual Parkitect mods below.
Steam Collection: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3647109901

You can ignore this setting. It is always on.

options.description: Dragon Shop (Recommended)

options.description: Revolution

options.description: Inverter & Somersault

options.name: jump_attraction
options.description: Jump²

options.name: rockin_tug_attraction
options.description: Rockin' Tug (Recommended)

options.name: fish_barrel_attraction
options.description: Fish In A Barrel

options.name: hopper_attraction
options.description: Hopper (Recommended)

options.name: demon_drop_attraction
options.description: Demon Drop

options.name: roto_shake_attraction
options.description: RotoShake

options.name: hexentanz_attraction
options.description: Hexentanz

options.name: power_swing_and_mega_swing_attraction
options.description: Power Swing & Mega Swing

options.name: kraken_attack_attraction
options.description: Kraken Attack (Recommended)

options.name: corkscrew_coaster
options.description: Corkscrew Coaster (Recommended)

options.name: inverted_launch_coaster
options.description: Inverted Launch Coaster

options.name: quadruple_rail_coaster
options.description: Quadruple Rail Coaster (Recommended)

options.name: retro_steel_coaster
options.description: Retro Steel Coaster (Recommended)

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
